title.ko: 시간 간격 측정 (펄스 특성을 측정하는 것 G01R, 예. G01R29/02; 레이더 또는 유사한 시스템에서의 것 G01S)
title.en: TIME-INTERVAL MEASURING (measuring pulse characteristics G01R, e.g. G01R0029020000;in radar or like systems G01S)

definition.ko: 미리 정해진 시간간격을 측정하는 것 시간표준을 발생하는 것 G04F5/00 장치; 구동기구가 없는 것; 구동기구가 있는 것 G04F1/00; 3/00 말지의 시간간격을 측정하는 것 기계적; 전자기계적; 전기적; 기타 G04F7/00; 8/00; 10/00; 13/00

title.en: Apparatus which can be set and started to measure-off predetermined or adjustably-fixed time intervals without driving mechanisms, e.g. egg timers
by consuming prefixed quantities of materials, e.g. by burning candle
by movement or acceleration due to gravity
by flowing-away of a prefixed quantity of fine-granular or liquid materials, e.g. sand-glass, water-clock
by a body falling a prefixed distance in air or in a viscous material
Apparatus which can be set and started to measure-off predetermined or adjustably-fixed time intervals with driving mechanisms, e.g. dosimeters with clockwork
with mechanical driving mechanisms
Additional arrangements in connection with ordinary non-electric clocks for this purpose
with electric driving mechanisms
Additional arrangements in connection with ordinary electric clocks for this purpose

title.ko: 타이밍 표준으로 사용하기 위해 미리 선택된 시간 간격을 생성하는 장치 (전기 디지털 컴퓨터용 시계 신호를 생성하는 것 G06F1/04)
title.en: Apparatus for producing preselected time intervals for use as timing standards (generating clock signals for electric digital computers G06F0001040000)
Metronomes
using oscillators with electromechanical resonators
using piezoelectric resonators
using magnetostrictive resonators

title.ko: 전기적 또는 전자적 공진기를 사용하는 것 (G04F5/14 가 우선)
title.en: using electric or electronic resonators (G04F0005140000 takes precedence)
using fluidic devices
using atomic clocks
using pulses produced by radio-isotopes

title.ko: 비전기적 수단으로 미지의 시간 간격을 측정하기 위한 장치 (유체 수단을 사용하는 것 G04F13/06)
title.en: Apparatus for measuring unknown time intervals by non-electric means  (using fluidic means G04F0013060000)
by measuring the distance of fall or the final velocity of a falling body
using a mechanical oscillator
running only during the time interval to be measured, e.g. stopwatches
Watches or clocks with stop devices, e.g. chronograph
Means used apart from the time-piece for starting or stopping same
Apparatus for measuring unknown time intervals by electromechanical means
using an electromechanical oscillator
using a piezoelectric oscillator
using a magnetostrictive oscillator
Means used apart from the time-piece for starting or stopping same
Apparatus for measuring unknown time intervals by electric means
using oscillators with passive electric resonator, e.g. lumped LC
by counting pulses or half-cycles of an AC
by measuring phase
using pulses produced by radio-isotopes
by measuring electric or magnetic quantities changing in proportion to time

title.ko: 그룹 G04F5/00-G04F10/00사이에 분류되지 않은 수단에 의하여 미지 시간간격을 측정하는 장치
title.en: Apparatus for measuring unknown time intervals by means not provided for in groups G04F0005000000-G04F0010000000
using optical means
using electrochemical means
using fluidic means
